entity.summary: China-origin crypto broker and exchange platform established in 2012 that officially launched its aggregated trading platform in 2019.
entity.notes: BitKan's official materials distinguish the platform's 2012 establishment from the 2019 launch of its trading platform. HEI uses 2019 as the exchange launch year and retains China as the historical operating origin based on official-domain material identifying Beijing headquarters. The exact trading-platform launch day is not stated, so January 1 is used as a year-level placeholder.

events.title: BitKan trading platform launched
events.description: BitKan officially launched its aggregated cryptocurrency trading platform in 2019 after operating since 2012 as a crypto data and services platform.
events.notes: The official source establishes the launch year but not the exact day, so January 1 is used as a year-level placeholder.

evidence.title: BitKan official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current BitKan identity and active trading service.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for BitKan
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the BitKan exchange identity.

evidence.title: What to Do if You are not Receiving Verification Texts on BitKan?
evidence.notes: Official-domain explainer states that BitKan was founded in 2012 and headquartered in Beijing, supporting historical operating origin rather than a current legal-domicile claim.

evidence.title: How To Join the BitKan Lunar Festival Event? Guide To Get Free Crypto Airdrop
evidence.notes: Official-domain article states that BitKan was established in 2012 and officially launched its trading platform in 2019.
